name: @wxyc/flowsheet-linked-reenrichment
description: WXYC one-shot re-enrichment of the BS#1443 enriched_no_match linked cohort (22,773 rows). Lane A (this package): flips cohort rows whose album already has populated album_metadata to enriched_match via pure SQL, zero LML. Lane B (LML re-lookup of the residual albums) lands in the chained follow-up PR (BS#1638).
